prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R** turbocharger (hybrid) with billet compressor wheel (64mm inducer, 88mm exducer) and Inconel turbine wheel (65mm) for the **CZSA 4.0L TFSI V8**, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and custom **APR Stage 3+ ECU calibration** (targeting 750whp on 93 octane with E85 flex fuel support).

Install a **Wagner Competition EVO II intercooler** (front-mount, 100% aluminum, 4.5L core volume) with **VRSF 3.5" silicone charge pipes** (reinforced with heat-resistant sleeves) and a **034 Motorsport billet aluminum throttle body spacer** to eliminate turbulence in the **CZSA intake manifold**.

Replace the factory **CZSA crankshaft** with a **Manley forged 4340 steel crank** (86mm stroke, balanced to 2g tolerance) and pair with **JE 2618-T6 forged pistons** (9.5:1 compression, coated skirts) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** (220,000 psi tensile strength). Use **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **Ferrea Competition Series valves** (intake: 37mm, exhaust: 32mm) with **Supertech dual valve springs** and **titanium retainers**.
estetica: Install a **Prior Design PD8XX widebody kit** (carbon fiber, bolt-on fenders with 30mm extended wheel arches) paired with **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels** (21x10.5 ET35 front, 21x12.5 ET45 rear) and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (295/30 front, 325/30 rear).

Replace the factory rear diffuser with an **AWE Tuning Track Edition diffuser** (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for C7 RS7 fitment) and add a **Vorsteiner V-FF102 front splitter** (carbon fiber, 3-piece adjustable) with **custom aluminum underbody bracing** to prevent flex at high speeds.

Retrofit **OEM+ Audi C8 RS7-style LED matrix headlights** (with **Lux H8 V4 LED bulbs** for high beams) and install a **Rieger Tuning RS7 Sportback rear wing** (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustable, 3D-printed endplates for optimal downforce). Lower the car with **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (24-way rebound/compression damping, 10kg/mm front springs, 12kg/mm rear springs) and add **H&R RS7-specific anti-roll bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear).
